docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KWONG, LINDY AS TO DEFENDANT WALLACE, PETER JAMES SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 78824264), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KWONG, LINDY SERVED MAR-06-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT WALLACE, PETER JAMES

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KWONG, LINDY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALLACE, PETER JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 672 37TH AVENUE, #3, ONE BEDROOM, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94121, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, *** THE RENTAL AGREEMENT IS CANCELED *** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 78976931)
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 78824264) AS TO DEFENDANT WALLACE, PETER JAMES

REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 78976931) AS TO DEFENDANT WALLACE, PETER JAMES
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 79112095)
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WALLACE, PETER JAMES
APPLICATION FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY; DECLARATION OF DAILY VALUE ($42.67/DAY) (TRANSACTION ID # 79112095) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KWONG, LINDY
